name: IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B
description: IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B table stores the interview scheduling related information.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: The primary key for this table.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_TEMPLATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies the default template for schedule creation. Possible values Y/N/null

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code associated with the schedule.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated requisition(IRC_REQUISITIONS_B) for this schedule.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_SCHEDULE_TYPE which can be a template or a normal schedule.

columns.Name: INTERVIEW_TYPE
columns.Comments: Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_INTERVIEW_TYPE which can be a Candidate or Hiring team manage.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the schedule template(IRC_IS_SCHEDULES_B) that was used to create this schedule.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the schedule location. (IRC_IS_LOCATIONS)

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last modified schedule.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments:
The status of the current schedule.

Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_SCHEDULE_STATUS_TYPE which can be a DRAFT, PUBLISHED, UNPUBLISHED.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_ICS
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the ICS.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_JOB_POSTING_LINK
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the Job Posting Link.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_RESUME
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the Candidate Resume.

columns.Name: INTR_INVITED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate to schedule an interview.

columns.Name: INTR_SCHEDULED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate that an interview has been scheduled.

columns.Name: INTR_CANCELLED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate that an interview has been cancelled.

columns.Name: INTR_UPDATED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate that an interview has been updated or rescheduled.

columns.Name: INTR_REMINDED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate for the interview reminder.

columns.Name: INTR_RESCHEDULED_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the associated content library (IRC_DESCRIPTIONS_B) Ad Hoc Email message for the candidate that reschedule interview has been requested.

columns.Name: IS_CANCELLABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when the candidate can cancel the interview (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: IS_RESCHEDULABLE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when the candidate can reschedule the interview (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: ALLOW_SAME_DAY_SCHDLNG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when candidate can schedule/reschedule on the same day. It can be, nowp lus 1 hour or 2 hours later. (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: HAS_VISIBILITY_RANGE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when a visibility on the interviews range should be applied. (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: INTERVWS_VISIBILITY_RANGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Values from lookup ORA_IRC_IS_INTERVWS_VISIBILITY

columns.Name: HAS_RESCHDLE_LIMIT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when a reschedule limit should be applied. (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: INTERVW_RESCHDLE_LIMIT_CODE
columns.Comments: Values from lookup ORA_IRC_IS_RESCHDLE_LIMIT

columns.Name: HAS_CHANGE_LOCK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y or N that is set to Y when reschedule/cancel should be controlled (Default value 'N')

columns.Name: INTERVW_CHANGE_LOCK_CODE
columns.Comments: Values from lookup ORA_IRC_IS_INTRVW_CHANG_LOCK

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ALMOST_FULL_NOTIF
columns.Comments: Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_SCH_ALMOST_FULL which can be no reminder or when number of openings are less than the given value

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ALMOST_FULL_THRESHOLD
columns.Comments: Value of the number of openings at which the schedule almost full reminder must be sent

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_FULL_NOTIF
columns.Comments: Lookup defined by ORA_IRC_IS_SCH_FULL which can be no reminder or when schedule is full

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SENT
columns.Comments: Stores the value of whether the schedule almost full or schedule full notifications has been sent since the last time openings were added to slot

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUTO_O365_CALENDAR_SLOT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determine if the O365 automatic slots creation is enabled for this shedule.Y or N or null value

columns.Name: AUTO_SLOT_INTERVIEW_DURATION
columns.Comments: Determine the interview meeting slot duration.Lookup to use ORA_IRC_IS_MEETING_DURATION

columns.Name: AUTO_COLLAB_RESP_TYPE_LIST
columns.Comments: The collaborator's type associated with this schedule will be used to determine the O365 available slots for the associated interviewers.

columns.Name: AUTO_MEETING_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Stores the value of the meeting provider for the interview.Value from Lookup type ORA_IRC_IS_ONLINE_MEETG_PROVIDER,ORA_IS_TEAMS

columns.Name: AUTO_MEETING_HOST
columns.Comments: Stores the value of meeting host for the interview. Selected named person or team member type as meeting host. Lookup to use ORA_HIRINGMANAGER or ORA_HIRING_TEAM_COLLABORATOR or ORA_RECRUITER or ORA_HOST

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_OWNER
columns.Comments: Person Id of the user who created the interview schedule

columns.Name: SEND_AVAILABILITY_REQUEST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Setting to request availability for defined users when the interview schedule is saved.Y or N or null value

columns.Name: IS_FEEDBK_INFO_FLAG
columns.Comments: Include the feedback information in interview schedule.Y or N

columns.Name: INCLUDE_INTERVIEWER_ICS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Include .isc file for interviewer

columns.Name: NB_DAYS_BEFORE_SCHDLNG
columns.Comments: Number of days before candidate can schedule

columns.Name: INCLUDE_COVER_LETTER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the Candidate Cover Letter

columns.Name: INCLUDE_MISC_ATTACHMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the Candidate Miscellaneous Attachments

columns.Name: INCLUDE_INTERNAL_DOCS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Include the Interviewer Documents for the Candidate Internal Documents
